{{Quote|These things are the future. Fill a ship with enough tractor beam arrays and you could prevent an enemy from jumping to hyperspace.|Travale, discussing tractor beams with [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|<ref name="Labyrinth of Evil">''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]''</ref>}}
'''Travale''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senate Bureau of Intelligence/Legends|Senate Bureau of Intelligence]] agent during the last years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Travale was not his true name, but rather a code name, as he had been inserted into the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] facility on the asteroid of [[Escarte/Legends|Escarte]] near the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was blonde, fair-complexioned, wide-shouldered, and as tall as [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]. He helped Skywalker and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] rescue the [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Thal K'sar]], and escape from the facility.

He also taught Kenobi how to deactivate [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beams]], predicting that they were the wave of the future. Kenobi was skeptical, and doubted that he would ever need to use that knowledge again.

==Appearances==
*''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' {{1st}}
